name: Kdan Mobile
description: Taiwan-based productivity SaaS — e-signature (DottedSign), PDF Reader, animation tools with developer APIs.

seo.title: Kdan Mobile — No-code / Low-code App Builders
seo.meta_description: Kdan Mobile: Taiwan-based productivity SaaS — e-signature (DottedSign), PDF Reader, animation tools with developer APIs.

when_to_use: E-signature workflow for contracts via DottedSign API
PDF editing and annotation via Kdan PDF Reader SDK
Integrating digital signature into a SaaS product via API
Document workflow automation for Taiwan-based enterprises
Mobile productivity tools for creative teams via Kdan apps

review.verdict: Decent APAC-focused productivity SaaS suite — global competitors usually win on polish and integrations.
review.best_for: APAC teams needing e-signature and PDF tooling with developer APIs
review.not_for: Global companies already paying for DocuSign, Dropbox Sign, or Adobe Acrobat Sign

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Free / hobby tier; no peak-lock evidence.
